qa_pairs.question: What files and subdirectories are extracted from `results.tar` into the `new_results/` directory when using the command `tar -C ./new_results/ -xvvf results.tar`?
qa_pairs.answer: The extracted contents include the `results/` directory itself, `results/log1.dat`, the `results/Res-01/` subdirectory, `results/Res-01/log.15Feb16.4`, the `results/Res-02/` subdirectory, and `results/Res-02/log.15Feb16.balance.b.4`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the file permissions for `results/log1.dat` after it's extracted?
What is the size of the `results/Res-01/log.15Feb16.4` file after extraction?
What was the last modification date and time for `results/Res-02/log.15Feb16.balance.b.4` when it was extracted?
qa_pairs.answer: The last modification date and time for `results/Res-02/log.15Feb16.balance.b.4` was 2016-11-16 15:10.

qa_pairs.question: Which command would you use to list the contents of the `new_results/results/` directory after the extraction process?
qa_pairs.answer: You would use the command `ls new_results/results/`.
